channel.title: Ellery on Jeremy Roschelle
channel.description: Recent content in Ellery on Jeremy Roschelle

item.title: Palm Sunday in Braga, Portugal
item.description: Semana Santa (Easter Week) coincided with my visit to Portugal to see Jacob and Ellery. On Palm Sunday, we decided to visit the city of Braga. Braga is the religious center of Portugal and celebrates with elaborate processions through the cobblestone streets. We arrived in Braga at the end of a 1-hour train ride from Porto. After a strong coffee at Nórdica Café, we waited in the square for the first procession.
